_note: Alexandra: add your own! Each spin picks one subject + one twist + one setting.
subjects: An ice cream cone with a face
A star that fell from the sky
A snail with a fancy shell
settings: at the top of a volcano
on a train through the mountains
in a garden of giant mushrooms
in a castle made of books
daily: Draw your favorite animal — but it's made entirely of fruit! 🍓
Draw an axolotl family portrait: mom, dad, and three babies. 🩷
Draw what your dream bedroom would look like. 🛏️
Draw a monster who is actually very shy and kind. 💚
Draw your favorite food as a superhero. 🦸
Close your eyes, scribble for 5 seconds, then turn the scribble into an animal! ✏️
Draw a house where a mermaid and an axolotl are roommates. 🏠
Draw the weather today — but make it have a face and a mood. ⛅
Draw a robot whose job is delivering birthday cakes. 🎂
Draw your family as cute animals. Which animal is each person? 🐾
Draw a magical door. What's behind it? Draw a peek of that too! 🚪
Draw an underwater tea party. 🫖
Draw a dragon who collects something silly instead of gold. 🐉
Draw the same simple cat twice: once realistic, once cartoon! 🐱
Draw a tiny world inside a soda bottle. 🥤
Draw a picnic on the moon — what food floats away? 🌙
Invent a brand-new animal by mixing two animals together. 🦄
Draw a rainy day, but the raindrops are something other than water. 🌧️
Draw an axolotl in your favorite outfit — YOUR actual favorite outfit. 👕
Draw a treehouse with at least three secret rooms. 🌳
Draw what music looks like when it comes out of a piano. 🎹
Draw a snail racing a turtle. Who's winning? 🐌
Draw the most beautiful ice cream sundae ever created. 🍨
Draw a friendly ghost's birthday party. 👻
Draw your name — but every letter is a different animal. 🔤
Draw a garden where candy grows instead of vegetables. 🍭
Draw a superhero whose power is making people laugh. 😂
Draw the view out your window — then add one impossible thing. 🪟
Draw a fish who dreams of flying. Give the dream a thought bubble! 🐟
Draw a cozy reading nook for a very tiny dragon. 📚
Draw breakfast having an argument with dinner. 🥞
